title: mercurialsolo/claudectl
summary: Auto pilot for Claude Code - connect multiple coding agents to a local LLM brain. 🆕 with a hive mind now

title: 7blacky7/synapse
summary: KI-Gedächtnis & Code-Intelligenz — Semantische Code-Suche, Wissensaustausch und Projekt-Pläne über MCP (Model Context Protocol). Verbindet lokale CLIs (Claude Code, Codex) und Web-KIs (Claude.ai) mit Qdrant + Ollama Embeddings.

title: kac89/vulnrepo
summary: VULNRΞPO - Free vulnerability report generator and repository, end-to-end encrypted! Templates of issues, CWE,CVE,MITRE ATT&CK,PCI DSS, import Nmap/Nessus/Burp/OpenVAS/Bugcrowd/Trivy, Jira export, TXT/JSON/MARKDOWN/HTML/DOCX, attachments, automatic changelog, stats, vulnerability management, bugbounty, local ai/llm, super fast pentest reporting!

title: Alex8791-cyber/cognithor
summary: Cognithor · Agent OS: Local-first autonomous agent operating system. 19 LLM providers, 18 channels, 145 MCP tools, 6-tier memory, Agent Packs marketplace, zero telemetry. Python 3.12+, Apache 2.0.

title: Peuqui/AIfred-Intelligence
summary: 🎩 AIfred - Multi-Agent AI Assistant with TTS, RAG, Web Research & Voice capabilities. Supports Ollama, vLLM, TabbyAPI. Features AIfred/Sokrates/Salomo debate system.

title: Nano-Collective/nanocoder
summary: A beautiful local-first coding agent running in your terminal - built by the community for the community ⚒

title: Oolab-labs/patchwork-os

title: Sungblab/opencairn-monorepo

title: pipeshub-ai/pipeshub-ai
summary: PipesHub is a fully extensible and explainable workplace AI platform for enterprise search and workflow automation

title: arn0ld87/agora
summary: Self-hosted GraphRAG + multi-agent social-media simulator. Upload a doc → build a knowledge graph → spawn persona-driven agents → generate a report. Ollama & Neo4j instead of Cloud-APIs. DACH-first. Lokaler Multi-Agent-Social-Media-Simulator mit GraphRAG-Pipeline. Dokument hoch, Knowledge-Graph bauen, Personas spawnen, Report raus. Ollama + Neo4j

title: CrispStrobe/CrispSorter
summary: AI-powered document organiser. Extracts text and/or sorts documents: Drop in a bunch of PDFs, DOCX files, or ebooks, and it extracts Document Text, identifies Title, Author, and Year, with a local or remote LLM, and moves them into folders, and/or keeps the extracted text.

title: kurok/pyimgtag
summary: Tag images with AI using a local Gemma model (via Ollama) — EXIF GPS reverse geocoding, Apple Photos write-back on macOS, no cloud, fully on-device

title: vipinthakur25/autocommit-ai
summary: Local AI agent for generating git commit messages on Android projects, powered by Gemma

title: jsuppe/loom
summary: 🧵 Requirements traceability for AI-assisted development. Extract requirements from conversations, link to code, detect drift.

title: adrianwedd/spark
summary: SPARK — a Claude-powered robot companion for a neurodivergent kid. Built on SunFounder PiCar-X + Raspberry Pi.

title: Bo1202/Aivy-OS
summary: Your own digital life form — local AI companion with persistent memory, IDE workspace, MCP support, and 30+ tools. Companion-first alternative to Hermes Agent / OpenClaw / Claude Code.

title: Arthurfert/LocalMind
summary: A graphic interface to interact with local LLMs.

title: amicalhq/amical
